name: ens-metadata-flarecloud
description: ENS metadata service on Cloudflare Workers

IPFS_CACHE.description: R2 bucket that caches IPFS content and HTTPS image bytes (keyed by CID or `sha256(url)`). Auto-provisioned on deploy.

RESOLVER_CACHE.description: KV namespace that caches resolved ENS avatar/header URIs for 15 minutes. Auto-provisioned on deploy.

THE_GRAPH_API_KEY.description: Optional. API key for authenticated queries against [The Graph](https://thegraph.com/studio/apikeys/). Leave blank to use public subgraph endpoints.

OPENSEA_API_KEY.description: Optional. API key for OpenSea-hosted NFT metadata used by ERC-721 and ERC-1155 avatar/header lookups.

RPC_API_KEY.description: Optional. Only needed if your configured `ETH_RPC_URL` / `SEPOLIA_RPC_URL` / `HOLESKY_RPC_URL` requires a bearer token.

PINATA_GATEWAY_TOKEN.description: Optional. Token for a private [Pinata](https://pinata.cloud) IPFS gateway. Leave blank if you're only using public gateways.
